ddls:
CREATE TABLE "go_terms" (
  "term_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the GO term */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the GO term */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the GO term in the dataset */,
  "plot_x" REAL /* X-coordinate for plotting */,
  "plot_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate for plotting */,
  "plot_size" REAL /* Size of the plot marker */,
  "log10_p_value" REAL /* Log10 of the p-value */,
  "uniqueness" REAL /* Measure of the uniqueness of the term */,
  "dispensability" REAL /* Measure of the dispensability of the term */,
  "representative" INTEGER /* Identifier for the representative term */,
  "eliminated" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the term is eliminated */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the GO term (e.g., Biological Process, Molecular Function, Cellular Component) */,
  "obsolete_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the GO term is obsolete */,
  "curator_notes" TEXT /* Notes from curators about the term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biological_processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biological process */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the biological process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the biological process */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the biological process (e.g., Developmental, Regulatory) */,
  "parent_process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent process (for hierarchical relationships) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "term_process_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "term_id" TEXT /* ID of the GO term */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the biological process */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_process_map_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES go_terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_process_map_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES biological_processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., public database, internal study) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, FASTQ) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "term_dataset_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "term_id" TEXT /* ID of the GO term */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_dataset_map_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES go_terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_dataset_map_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plots" (
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plot */,
  "term_id" TEXT /* ID of the GO term */,
  "plot_type" TEXT /* Type of plot (e.g., scatter, bar) */,
  "plot_x" REAL /* X-coordinate for plotting */,
  "plot_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate for plotting */,
  "plot_size" REAL /* Size of the plot marker */,
  "log10_p_value" REAL /* Log10 of the p-value */,
  "plot_title" TEXT /* Title of the plot */,
  "plot_description" TEXT /* Description of the plot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plots_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES go_terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical measure */,
  "term_id" TEXT /* ID of the GO term */,
  "log10_p_value" REAL /* Log10 of the p-value */,
  "uniqueness" REAL /* Measure of the uniqueness of the term */,
  "dispensability" REAL /* Measure of the dispensability of the term */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the statistical measures */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_measures_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES go_terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "term_id" TEXT /* ID of the GO term (if applicable) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset (if applicable) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES go_terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "representative_terms" (
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each representative term entry */,
  "term_id" TEXT /* ID of the GO term */,
  "representative_term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representative term */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Similarity score between the term and its representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representative_terms_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES go_terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "eliminated_terms" (
  "elimination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each elimination entry */,
  "term_id" TEXT /* ID of the GO term */,
  "elimination_date" TEXT /* Date the term was eliminated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for elimination */,
  "replacement_term_id" TEXT /* ID of the term that replaces the eliminated term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("elimination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_eliminated_terms_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES go_terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation entry */,
  "term_id" TEXT /* ID of the GO term */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was made */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or annotation text */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., comment, note) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES go_terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "term_id" TEXT /* ID of the GO term */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the publication was published */,
  "publication_volume" TEXT /* Volume of the publication */,
  "publication_issue" TEXT /* Issue of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES go_terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene association */,
  "term_id" TEXT /* ID of the GO term */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the gene */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "association_type" TEXT /* Type of association (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  "evidence_code" TEXT /* Evidence code supporting the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_associations_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES go_terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene function */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene */,
  "function_description" TEXT /* Description of the gene function */,
  "function_type" TEXT /* Type of function (e.g., catalytic, regulatory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_functions_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES gene_associations ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathways" (
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biological pathway */,
  "pathway_name" TEXT /* Name of the pathway */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pathway */,
  "pathway_type" TEXT /* Type of pathway (e.g., signaling, metabolic) */,
  "parent_pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent pathway (for hierarchical relationships) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "term_pathway_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "term_id" TEXT /* ID of the GO term */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the biological pathway */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_pathway_map_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES go_terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_pathway_map_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_pathway_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the biological pathway */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_pathway_map_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_pathway_map_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES gene_associations ("gene_id")
)
